title: lagerstroemia duperreana var. duperreana
intro: Lagerstroemia duperreana var. duperreana, also known as the Duperre's crape myrtle, is a plant species belonging to the Lythraceae family. It is widely recognized for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate fever, and boost the immune system. Lagerstroemia duperreana var. duperreana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
